name: node-ajv-keywords
title: node-ajv-keywords
summary: Custom JSON-Schema keywords for Ajv validator
description:
Custom JSON-Schema keywords for Ajv validator
Ajv is the fastest JSON Schema validator for node.js and browser with draft
04/06/07 support. Ajv generates code using doT templates to turn JSON schemas
into super-fast validation functions that are efficient for v8 optimization.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-ajv-keywords because Custom JSON-Schema keywords for Ajv validator.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-ajv-keywords as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-ajv-keywords with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-ajv-keywords --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
